description: Occupation Morphus table (Dark Designs pp. 43–45). Dream career or profession manifests as permanent Morphus features.

entries.name: A Suit/Consummate Professional
entries.description: Business attire and executive bearing—power-player confidence suited to Wall Street or any cubicle farm.
customOneOffs: No Secondary Skills—career-focused only.
-5% to all skills except Communications, Math, and Technical skills (partially modeled via global -5% with listed exceptions at 0% offset).

entries.name: Uniform/Official
entries.description: Service-profession uniform (medic, firefighter, police, pilot, mechanic, etc.)—symbol of authority and pride, details may be accurate or invented.
customOneOffs: +5% to Invoke Trust/Intimidate.
-10% to all Physical and Rogue skills (global modifier above; adjust individual skills at play).
Unlikely to be fully trusted by Warlords criminals.

entries.name: Hazardous Duty
entries.description: Protective gear from hazardous jobs—vest, riot gear, hard hat, Hazmat, clean-room suit, heat suit, etc.; same bonuses regardless of appearance.

entries.name: Communications
entries.description: Ear devices and built-in wireless comms (walkie-talkie, phone, CB, etc.); can reach any wireless network when frequency or number is known.
customOneOffs: +10% to all Communications skills (partially modeled via radio/computer overrides).
Communications untraceable by modern methods; no roaming charges.
Internet, GPS, and similar network access when the network is known.
Detected by Hounds and supernatural-sensitive beings at 50% greater range.

entries.name: Tools of the Trade
entries.description: 1D4+3 profession-critical tools on transformation (may be grafted); player and G.M. choose items together.
customOneOffs: +5% to O.C.C. skills related to the tools and trade.
Each tool 3D6 S.D.C.; lost/destroyed tools vanish 24 hours.
Battery-powered tools never run low; ammo/supplies reload each hour.
Most tools 1D4–1D6 damage if used as weapons.

entries.name: Time Clock or Timepiece
entries.description: Punch clock or electronic scanner built into the chest; displays exact time to the second.
customOneOffs: +2 Spd in bonuses and -2 Spd in penalties (net 0; not duplicated in statModifiers).
Accurate sense of time and passage of time in Morphus.
+5% to time/timing skills including Performance and time anomalies (partially modeled above).
Always on time; anxiety prone about punctuality.

entries.name: Water Cooler
entries.description: Large back-mounted drink tank (water, coffee, etc.) with spigot; affable gossip in casual situations.
customOneOffs: No hydration required in Morphus; never thirsty.
Water blast 2D6 to vampires; one attack per blast; endless payload; burst only (cannot fill a glass).
Tank ~25 lb (11 kg), always two-thirds full; sloshing weight causes skill penalties above.

entries.name: Mechanic/Mechanical
entries.description: Gears, springs, pulleys, and bolts built into or bolted onto the body—machine repair specialist.
customOneOffs: +2 Perception only for mechanical problems and repairs; -2 Perception when absorbed in machine work.
+10% to mechanics and mechanical repair skills.
Prefers working on machines over socializing.

entries.name: Electrician/Electronic Devices
entries.description: Wires, microchips, and circuit boards on or emerging from the body; eyes may appear as dim LEDs.
customOneOffs: +2 Perception for electronics/circuitry problems and repairs; -3 Perception when absorbed in electronics work.
+5% to electronics, electrical repair, and computer skills.
Electrical attacks and lightning half damage (modeled in damageAffinities).
Loses track of time when focused on devices.

entries.name: Workaholic
entries.description: Haggard, bloodshot, caffeine-fueled appearance—wrinkled clothes, five-o'clock shadow, built-in caffeine tubes optional.
customOneOffs: Needs only half normal sleep.
-5% to Science, most Technical, Piloting, Demolitions, and similar focus skills.
Physical skills and quick tasks: no penalty.
01–50% chance of falling asleep on guard duty or as lookout.
